items.title: Agri-Tech
items.body: Develop integrated agriculture solutions from pre- to post-harvest to improve efficiency, reduce loss, and raise value across the supply chain.

items.title: Food-Tech
items.body: Research and develop ready-to-eat food products with consistent quality standards and scalable commercial production.

items.title: Bio-Tech
items.body: Apply biotechnology to food and agriculture products to create added value and commercial expansion pathways.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To become a leader in developing knowledge and intellectual property that drive a sustainable innovation-driven economy.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To develop and commercialize research, technology, and IP into scalable business models that create tangible economic impact.

paragraphs: KYN Partners & Co was founded with the vision of becoming an "Architecture of Innovation" that transforms knowledge, research, and intellectual property into innovation and business models ready for commercialization.

The company is rooted in Agri-Food Innovation and specializes in product innovation, IP commercialization, and business model design, combining science, technology, and strategic collaboration to build a connected ecosystem of products, technologies, and partners.

products.title: Products
products.lead: A curated lineup of furnishings and finishes tailored for premium office environments.

food.title: Food Product
food.subtitle:
Ready-to-use seasoning powder products under the Svariest brand, 
developed for convenience, consistent flavor, and the needs of modern consumers.

items.title: Ready-to-Cook Spice Blend
items.body: A ready-to-cook seasoning powder made from more than 12 authentic Thai herbs and spices, bringing together traditional Thai flavors in one convenient sachet. Richly aromatic and perfectly balanced, it can be used in a variety of Thai and fusion dishes. Suitable for grilling, marinating, stir-frying, or seasoning, it helps elevate dishes with a distinctive Thai taste effortlessly.

items.title: Ready-to-Eat Mala Spice
items.body: A ready-to-eat mala seasoning powder that combines the bold spiciness of mala with the aromatic essence of Thai herbs. The flavor is intense yet well-balanced in a way familiar to Thai consumers. Perfect for grilling, marinating, stir-frying, or dipping sauces, it adds a unique layer of Thai-inspired flavor to a wide range of dishes.

items.title: Ready-to-Cook Laab Spice
items.body: A ready-to-cook laab seasoning powder based on the original Northern Thai recipe. Infused with Thai spices and local herbs, it delivers the authentic spicy, aromatic, and well-rounded flavor of traditional laab. Convenient for making laab, spicy salads, nam tok, or even dipping sauces without the need to prepare multiple ingredients.

storage.title: Storage & Usage Instructions
items: Store in a dry, cool place away from direct sunlight.
Seal tightly after opening to preserve aroma.
Use within 30 days for best flavor.

pet.title: Pet Food Product
pet.subtitle: Nutrition-focused recipes tailored for pets.
pet.body: Soft bites with omega-rich ingredients and a gentle aroma.

agro.title: Agro Product
agro.subtitle: Sustainable crop care formulated for growth and resilience.
agro.body: Organic nutrient concentrate designed for plant vitality.

items.body: On-site guidance to deliver a flawless, on-brand result.
